title: MuleSoft Anypoint Application
description: Schema for a Mule application deployed to the Anypoint Platform, including configuration for CloudHub, Runtime Fabric, and hybrid deployment targets.

domain.description: Unique domain name for the application, used as the subdomain in the CloudHub URL

fullDomain.description: Full domain including the platform suffix (e.g., myapp.cloudhub.io)

status.description: Current deployment status of the application

description.description: Human-readable description of the application purpose and functionality

organizationId.description: Unique identifier of the organization that owns this application

environmentId.description: Unique identifier of the environment where this application is deployed

region.description: Cloud region where the application is deployed

properties.description: Application properties passed as runtime configuration to the Mule runtime

secureProperties.description: List of property keys that are treated as secure and masked in the UI

lastUpdateTime.description: Timestamp of the last application update or redeployment

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the application was first created

fileName.description: Name of the deployed application archive file (JAR or ZIP)

monitoringEnabled.description: Whether Anypoint Monitoring is enabled for this application

monitoringAutoRestart.description: Whether the platform automatically restarts the application on failure

staticIPsEnabled.description: Whether static IP addresses are allocated to this application

persistentQueues.description: Whether persistent queues are enabled for reliable message processing

persistentQueuesEncrypted.description: Whether persistent queue data is encrypted at rest

objectStoreV1.description: Whether the application uses the legacy Object Store v1

objectStoreV2.description: Whether the application uses Object Store v2

loggingNgEnabled.description: Whether next-generation logging with Anypoint Monitoring is enabled

ipAddresses.description: List of IP addresses assigned to the application workers

logLevels.description: Custom log level configuration for application packages

MuleVersion.description: Mule runtime version information for the deployed application

updateId.description: Runtime update identifier for patch-level updates

endOfSupportDate.description: Date when this runtime version reaches end of support

WorkerConfig.description: Worker configuration defining compute resources allocated to the application

amount.description: Number of worker instances running the application

type.description: Worker type defining the vCore allocation and memory

weight.description: vCore weight of the worker type

remainingOrgWorkers.description: Remaining vCore allocation available in the organization after this application

TrackingSettings.description: Transaction tracking configuration for API analytics and debugging

VpnConfig.description: VPN configuration for connecting the application to a private network

vpnId.description: Unique identifier of the Anypoint VPN connection

vpcId.description: Unique identifier of the Anypoint Virtual Private Cloud

LogLevel.description: Custom log level override for a specific package or class

packageName.description: Fully qualified Java package or class name
